englishDefinitions: Someone is about to die or face serious trouble.
A person's luck has run out.
persianTranslation: زمانِ مرگ یا گرفتاری شدید کسی رسیده
examples: When the boss saw the mistake, he said the worker's number was up.
In the movie, the villain realized his number was up.
If they catch you cheating again, your number is up.
